---
title: "Look at best models"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Climate to microtopo mods
```{r clim2mt}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)

clim2mt_mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_clim_then_mt_mods_Apr8.RDS")

growth_var_mod <- clim2mt_mods[[1]]
growth_var_data <- clim2mt_mods[[2]]

surv_mod <- clim2mt_mods[[3]]
growth_mod <- clim2mt_mods[[4]]
repro_mod <- clim2mt_mods[[5]]
nflrs_mod <- clim2mt_mods[[6]]

sjPlot::plot_model(surv_mod,type="pred",terms="log_size_t0")

```
